title: Building Smarter Web 3.0 Applications - Exactink
heading: From a Small Garage to a Growing Tech Powerhouse
content: Exactink’s journey began in a humble 225 sq. ft. garage with minimal investment but unlimited determination. What started as a small group of passionate tech enthusiasts has now grown into a full-time, stable, and highly capable team that consistently delivers to client expectations. Today, we operate from a 2000 sq. ft. office in the heart of the city—a testament to our hard work, growth, and commitment to excellence. From modest beginnings to a thriving workspace, our focus has always remained the same: delivering quality, building trust, and evolving with every project.

title: Building Smarter Web 3.0 Applications - Exactink
heading: Case Studies Proven Success & Impact
content: We leverage the latest technologies to build high-performance, secure, and scalable solutions tailored to your business needs. 01 BigFin Fishing – Ultimate Fishing App BigFin Fishing is the ultimate app for fishing enthusiasts! Whether you’re a seasoned angler or just starting, this app helps you log your catches, connect with fellow fishers, and compete in exciting tournaments. Track the weather, showcase your best catches, and create an engaging fishing journal – all in one place!

title: Building Smarter Web 3.0 Applications - Exactink
heading: BigFin Fishing – Ultimate Fishing App
content: BigFin Fishing is the ultimate app for fishing enthusiasts! Whether you’re a seasoned angler or just starting, this app helps you log your catches, connect with fellow fishers, and compete in exciting tournaments. Track the weather, showcase your best catches, and create an engaging fishing journal – all in one place! 02 Power Play – Fantasy Sports App Power Play is a high-performance fantasy sports app designed for cricket, football, and basketball enthusiasts. With an intuitive UI, seamless onboarding, and real-time match updates, users can create teams, join contests, and win exciting rewards. The app ensures an immersive experience with engaging features like bonus offers, live score tracking, and user-friendly navigation.

title: About Us - Exactink
heading: Where Our Journey Started
content: The story of Exactink isn’t just about software—it’s about belief. Belief in starting small, thinking big, and building something meaningful without shortcuts. 2016 225 Sq.Ft The Belief Nearly 9.5 years ago, Exactink was just an idea—one shared by three colleagues working at the same workplace. Over time, they realized they had something rare: a common vision, complementary skills, and a hunger to take a bigger risk. With nothing but courage and clarity, they stepped away from the comfort of their jobs and started Exactink.

title: About Us - Exactink
heading: The Belief
content: Nearly 9.5 years ago, Exactink was just an idea—one shared by three colleagues working at the same workplace. Over time, they realized they had something rare: a common vision, complementary skills, and a hunger to take a bigger risk. With nothing but courage and clarity, they stepped away from the comfort of their jobs and started Exactink. 2021 800 Sq.Ft The Humble Start The beginning was humble—a 225 sq. ft. garage-like office space, the kind where you shared desks, wore multiple hats, and counted every rupee. There was no investor, no backup, no fancy setup—just sheer dedication and the will to make it work. The early days were tough. Every project mattered. Every deadline was personal. But slowly, client by client, line by line of code, Exactink started growing. Not through viral marketing or massive campaigns, but through trust—through delivering real results to real businesses.

title: About Us - Exactink
heading: The Humble Start
content: The beginning was humble—a 225 sq. ft. garage-like office space, the kind where you shared desks, wore multiple hats, and counted every rupee. There was no investor, no backup, no fancy setup—just sheer dedication and the will to make it work. The early days were tough. Every project mattered. Every deadline was personal. But slowly, client by client, line by line of code, Exactink started growing. Not through viral marketing or massive campaigns, but through trust—through delivering real results to real businesses. 2022 1250 Sq.Ft The Growth Phase What set Exactink apart was its DNA: rooted in experience, built on teamwork, and driven by a no-excuses attitude. Over the years, that spirit attracted more talent, more challenges, and more opportunities. The company evolved from a one-person grind to a tight-knit team. From small websites to full-scale digital platforms. From freelancers to full-time experts. All of this, without raising a single rupee in external funding.

title: About Us - Exactink
heading: The Growth Phase
content: What set Exactink apart was its DNA: rooted in experience, built on teamwork, and driven by a no-excuses attitude. Over the years, that spirit attracted more talent, more challenges, and more opportunities. The company evolved from a one-person grind to a tight-knit team. From small websites to full-scale digital platforms. From freelancers to full-time experts. All of this, without raising a single rupee in external funding. 2023 2000 Sq.Ft Today Today, Exactink operates from a proud 2000 sq. ft. office—a symbol not of status, but of survival. Of showing what’s possible when you combine skill with resilience, and ambition with integrity. The journey from a garage to a thriving IT company wasn’t easy—but it was earned, every inch of the way. And through it all, the three founders—friends, colleagues, now partners—remained grounded in the values they started with: trust, quality, and the courage to build something real.

title: About Us - Exactink
heading: Today
content: Today, Exactink operates from a proud 2000 sq. ft. office—a symbol not of status, but of survival. Of showing what’s possible when you combine skill with resilience, and ambition with integrity. The journey from a garage to a thriving IT company wasn’t easy—but it was earned, every inch of the way. And through it all, the three founders—friends, colleagues, now partners—remained grounded in the values they started with: trust, quality, and the courage to build something real. This is just the beginning—many more milestones await.
